_note: Citi config (placeholder, 2026-05-01). Branding palette uses Citi Blue #003B70 as primary and Citi Red #D9261C as secondary accent. Wordmark recreated stylistically (lowercase 'citi' sans-serif + red arc above the 't') — NOT the actual Citi logo asset, per Round 6 wordmark precedent. The branding section is production-ready for the unified demo's brand-switch (Beat 2 + Beat 7). Pipeline showcase content is placeholder; the unified demo (Beats 1-7) uses brand-locked colors + custom CitiWordmark component, not the pipeline-template content.
_research_gaps: branding.logoUrl — intentionally null per user directive; Iddo will add later
avatar_video_url — intentionally null per Q4 lock; CTA hides until Iddo delivers Supabase URL

Pinned story selection — Citi pitch not yet locked; pipeline-template content stays placeholder until a Citi-specific story is chosen (Citi Q1 2026 earnings / Citi Self Invest launch / Citigold expansion / etc.)

Brand palette per Citi guidelines: #003B70 Ateneo Blue (Pantone 654 C, primary brand color); #D9261C Maximum Red (Pantone 485 C, the iconic arc accent). The unified demo uses --accent=#003B70, --accent-2=#D9261C; brand-switch flash uses Citi Blue gradient with red highlights. successColor falls back to neutral #22c55e (per Beat 4 B.4.D non-green-brand rule).
